items.title: Rename repo and update ChatGPT instruction
items.description: Rename GitHub repo from system-instructions to agents, update remote URL, update README, and replace ChatGPT system instruction with new leverage-focused content.

items.title: Developer Signal Extraction
items.description: E-001: Extract developer signals from configured sources (documentation, blog posts, GitHub issues, GitHub discussions). This is the first stage of the DevRel Agent pipeline.

items.title: DevRel Insight Generation
items.description: E-002: Generate DevRel insights from classified developer signals. Convert signals into friction insights and developer questions.

items.title: Monetized AI Tool Generation
items.description: E-003: Generate monetized AI tool concepts using RevenueCat. Includes tool concepts, monetization models, and integration examples.

items.title: DevRel Report Generation
items.description: E-004: Assemble all outputs into a structured DevRel Agent Report in Markdown format.

items.title: Evidence Source Linking
items.description: E-005: Link insights back to their original evidence sources for traceability.

items.title: Report Export Enhancements
items.description: E-006: Enhanced export options for DevRel reports beyond Markdown.

items.title: Extract Developer Signals
items.description:
US-001: As a system, I extract developer signals from configured sources.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given sources are configured
- When the agent runs
- Then developer signals are collected

items.title: Identify Developer Friction
items.description:
US-002: Identify developer friction from signals.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given developer signals exist
- When the agent analyzes signals
- Then friction insights are generated

items.title: Generate AI Tool Concepts
items.description:
US-003: Generate AI tool concepts from friction insights.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given friction insights exist
- When the reasoning stage runs
- Then AI tool concepts are generated

items.title: Generate Monetization Models
items.description:
US-004: Generate monetization models for AI tool concepts.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given an AI tool concept exists
- When monetization generation runs
- Then a subscription model is produced

items.title: Generate RevenueCat Integration Examples
items.description:
US-005: Generate RevenueCat integration examples for AI tool concepts.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given an AI tool concept exists
- When integration generation runs
- Then RevenueCat example code is produced

items.title: Produce DevRel Agent Report
items.description:
US-006: Produce the final DevRel Agent Report.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Given the pipeline finishes
- When report generation runs
- Then a structured DevRel report is created in Markdown

items.title: Unblock DevRel Agent distribution gate
items.description: Verification currently fails (static signals, placeholder evidence URLs, and insufficient real batches). Implement live GitHub signal extraction and generate 3+ real batch reports so `cd devrel-agent && npm run verify` passes.
